nodes.name: Fetch Source IDs
nodes.notes: Dynamically fetch source slug-to-ID mapping from Supabase instead of hardcoding UUIDs.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ id: $json.pinecone_id, content: $json.content, title: $json.title, source: $json.source, source_slug: $json.source_slug, published_at: $json.published_at, url: $json.url, article_id: $json.article_id }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ id: $json.article_id, source_id: $json.source_id, title: $json.title, url: $json.url, content: $json.content, excerpt: $json.excerpt, published_at: $json.published_at, embedding_id: $json.pinecone_id }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', message: 'RSS ingestion completed', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

meta.description: Polls RSS feeds every 2 hours (or on-demand via POST /webhook/jaegeren-ingest). Processes articles and dual-writes to Pinecone (vector search) and Supabase (frontend display).
